main.description: Layout (path style, handle, label offset) for an edge. rkey = EdgeId (UUID), so exactly one current layout exists per edge per repo.

edge.description: The edge record this layout applies to.

sourceHandle.description: React Flow handle ID on the source node.

targetHandle.description: React Flow handle ID on the target node.

labelOffsetX.description: Label X offset from edge midpoint in pixels.

labelOffsetY.description: Label Y offset from edge midpoint in pixels.
